title: Content Credential JSON (CrJSON) Document Schema
description: JSON Schema for Content Credential JSON (CrJSON) documents. CrJSON does not include asset_info, content, or metadata.

@context.description: JSON-LD context defining namespaces and vocabularies

manifests.description: Array of C2PA manifests embedded in the asset

validationResults.description: Validation results from validation (active manifest and ingredient deltas)

jsonGenerator.description: Information about the claim generator, including date stamp
Information about the claim generator (generator-info fields) plus date stamp

version.description: Version of the software (SemVer 2.0: major.minor.patch with optional pre-release and build)

date.description: Date and time when the CrJSON was generated (ISO 8601)

assertions.description: Assertions contained within the manifest, keyed by the assertion's label

claim.description: Claim map (v1) per C2PA CDDL claim-map; alternative to claim.v2. A manifest SHALL contain either claim or claim.v2.

claim.v2.description: Normalized claim (v2) per C2PA CDDL claim-map-v2; alternative to claim. A manifest SHALL contain either claim or claim.v2.

claimV1.description: Claim map (v1) per C2PA CDDL claim-map. Alternative to claim.v2; each manifest may contain either claim or claim.v2.

claim_generator.description: User-Agent string for the claim generator that created the claim (RFC 7231 §5.5.3)

claim_generator_info.description: Detailed information about the claim generator (one or more generator-info maps)

signature.description: JUMBF URI reference to the signature of this claim

assertions.description: Hashed URI references to assertions in this claim

instanceID.description: Uniquely identifies a specific version of an asset

redacted_assertions.description: JUMBF URI references to redacted ingredient manifest assertions

alg.description: Cryptographic hash algorithm for data hash assertions in this claim (C2PA data hash algorithm identifier registry)

alg_soft.description: Algorithm for soft binding assertions in this claim (C2PA soft binding algorithm identifier registry)

hashedUriMap.description: Hashed URI reference (url and hash) per C2PA CDDL $hashed-uri-map

alg.description: Hash algorithm identifier; if absent, taken from enclosing structure

assertionMetadataMap.description: Additional information about an assertion per C2PA CDDL $assertion-metadata-map.

dateTime.description: RFC 3339 date-time when the assertion was created/generated (tdate)

reference.description: Hashed URI reference to another assertion that this review is about

dataSource.description: Description of the source of the assertion data

localizations.description: Localizations for strings in the assertion

regionOfInterest.description: Region of the asset where this assertion is relevant ($region-map)

sourceMap.description: Source of assertion data per C2PA CDDL source-map.

details.description: Human-readable details about the source, e.g. URL of the remote server

ratingMap.description: Rating of an assertion item per C2PA CDDL rating-map.

localizationDataEntry.description: Localization dictionary per C2PA CDDL localization-data-entry (language keys to string).

instanceID.description: Uniquely identifies a specific version of an asset

claim_generator_info.description: The claim generator of this claim (single generator-info map)

signature.description: JUMBF URI reference to the signature of this claim

created_assertions.description: Hashed URI references to created assertions

gathered_assertions.description: Hashed URI references to gathered assertions

redacted_assertions.description: JUMBF URI references to the assertions of ingredient manifests being redacted

alg.description: Cryptographic hash algorithm for data hash assertions in this claim (C2PA data hash algorithm identifier registry)

alg_soft.description: Algorithm for soft binding assertions in this claim (C2PA soft binding algorithm identifier registry)

specVersion.description: The version of the specification used to produce this claim (SemVer)

^c2pa\\.hash\\.(data|bmff\\.v2|boxes)\\..description: Part hash assertion: standard hard binding assertion with .part and optional multiple instance identifier (e.g. c2pa.hash.data.part, c2pa.hash.data.part__2). Byte offsets in the assertion are relative to the part.

algorithm.description: Alternative field name for hash algorithm

hashBoxesAssertion.description: Boxes hash assertion per C2PA CDDL box-map (c2pa.hash.boxes).

alg.description: Cryptographic hash algorithm (C2PA hash algorithm identifier). If absent, taken from enclosing structure.

boxHashMap.description: Single box hash entry per C2PA CDDL box-hash-map.

items.description: Box identifier in order of appearance (e.g. APP0, IHDR); box-name

names.description: Box identifiers in order of appearance

alg.description: Hash algorithm for this box; if absent, from enclosing structure

hash.description: Hash value (byte string; in JSON typically Base64-encoded)

excluded.description: If true, a validator can ignore this box (and associated hash) during validation

exclusions.description: Hash exclusion ranges; ranges have monotonically increasing start values and do not overlap

pad.description: Zero-filled byte string used for filling up space (typically Base64 in JSON)

pad2.description: Zero-filled byte string used for filling up space (typically Base64 in JSON)

boxExclusionsMap.description: Exclusion range per C2PA CDDL box-exclusions-map.

start.description: Starting byte offset from the start of the box (uint)

length.description: Number of bytes of data to exclude (uint)

boxIndex.description: 0-based index into the names array in the box-hash-map; can be omitted if the number of boxes is one

hashMultiAssetAssertion.description: Multi-asset hash assertion per C2PA CDDL multi-asset-hash-map (c2pa.hash.multi-asset).

parts.description: Array of hashes for individual parts of the multi-part file

partHashMap.description: Part hash entry per C2PA CDDL part-hash-map.

location.description: Location of the part within the file (byte range or BMFF box path)

hashAssertion.description: Hashed URI to the hash assertion for the part (e.g. c2pa.hash.data.part, c2pa.hash.data.part__2). Byte offsets in that assertion are relative to the part.

optional.description: If true, the part is optional and can be discarded

locatorMap.description: Location of a part per C2PA CDDL locator-map (byte range or BMFF box path).

byteOffset.description: Byte offset of the part within the file (uint)

length.description: Length of the part in bytes (uint)

bmffBox.description: XPath to the BMFF box of the part

softBindingAssertion.description: Soft binding assertion per C2PA CDDL soft-binding-map (c2pa.soft-binding).

alg.description: Soft binding algorithm and version from C2PA soft binding algorithm list. If absent, taken from enclosing alg_soft.

blocks.description: One or more soft bindings across some or all of the asset's content

pad.description: Zero-filled byte string for filling space (typically Base64 in JSON)

pad2.description: Zero-filled byte string for filling space (typically Base64 in JSON)

name.description: Human-readable description of what this hash covers

alg-params.description: CBOR byte string (e.g. Base64 in JSON) describing parameters of the soft binding algorithm

bindingMetadata.description: Additional metadata of the soft binding

softBindingBlockMap.description: Single soft binding block per C2PA CDDL soft-binding-block-map.

scope.description: Scope of the digital content over which the soft binding is computed

value.description: CBOR byte string (e.g. Base64 in JSON), in algorithm-specific format, for the soft binding value over this block

softBindingScopeMap.description: Scope of content for a soft binding block per C2PA CDDL soft-binding-scope-map.

extent.description: Deprecated. CBOR byte string (e.g. Base64) describing the part of content over which the binding was computed

timespan.description: Time range over which the soft binding value has been computed

softBindingTimespanMap.description: Time range per C2PA CDDL soft-binding-timespan-map.

start.description: Start of the time range in milliseconds from media start (uint)

end.description: End of the time range in milliseconds from media start (uint)

softBindingMetadataMap.description: Additional metadata per C2PA CDDL soft-binding-metadata-map.

description.description: Additional description of the implementation or author of the binding or algorithm

contact.description: Contact information for the implementation or author of the binding or algorithm

informationalUrl.description: Web page with more details about the implementation or author of the binding or algorithm

actionsAssertionV1.description: Actions assertion (v1) per C2PA CDDL actions-map; list of action-items-map.

actionItemV1.description: Single action (v1) per C2PA CDDL action-items-map.

softwareAgent.description: The software agent that performed the action

changed.description: Semicolon-delimited list of parts of the resource that were changed since the previous event history

digitalSourceType.description: One of the defined source types at https://cv.iptc.org/newscodes/digitalsourcetype/

parametersMapV1.description: Action parameters (v1) per C2PA CDDL parameters-map.

ingredient.description: Hashed URI to the ingredient assertion this action acts on

actionsAssertionV2.description: Actions assertion (v2) per C2PA CDDL actions-map-v2.

templates.description: List of templates for the actions

softwareAgents.description: List of software/hardware that performed the actions (generator-info maps)

allActionsIncluded.description: If true, indicates that all actions performed are included in this assertion

actionItemV2.description: Single action (v2) per C2PA CDDL action-item-map-v2.

softwareAgent.description: Description of the software/hardware that did the action (generator-info map)

softwareAgentIndex.description: 0-based index into the softwareAgents array in the actions assertion

description.description: Additional description of the action, important for custom actions

digitalSourceType.description: One of the defined source types at https://cv.iptc.org/newscodes/digitalsourcetype/

changes.description: Regions of interest of the resource that were changed

reason.description: Reason the action was performed (required when action is c2pa.redacted); $action-reason

actionTemplateV2.description: Action template (v2) per C2PA CDDL action-template-map-v2.

icon.description: Hashed URI reference to an embedded data assertion

regionMap.description: Region of interest per C2PA CDDL region-map (referenced by action-item-map-v2 changes).

parametersMapV2.description: Action parameters (v2) per C2PA CDDL parameters-map-v2.

redacted.description: JUMBF URI to the redacted assertion (required when action is c2pa.redacted)

ingredients.description: List of hashed JUMBF URIs to ingredient (v2 or v3) assertion(s) this action acts on

sourceLanguage.description: BCP-47 code of the source language for c2pa.translated

targetLanguage.description: BCP-47 code of the target language for c2pa.translated

multipleInstances.description: Whether this action was performed multiple times

operating_system.description: Operating system the software runs on

certificateInfo.description: Certificate details (serial number, issuer, subject, validity)

timeStampInfo.description: Timestamp information (e.g. from TSA), when present

timestamp.description: Time when the claim was signed (e.g. from TSA timestamp); RFC 3339 format

ingredientAssertionV1.description: Ingredient assertion (v1) per C2PA CDDL ingredient-map.

instanceID.description: Unique identifier, e.g. value of the ingredient's xmpMM:InstanceID

relationship.description: Relationship of this ingredient to the asset; $relation-choice (parentOf, componentOf, inputTo)

c2pa_manifest.description: Hashed URI reference to the C2PA Manifest of the ingredient

thumbnail.description: Hashed URI reference to an ingredient thumbnail

ingredientAssertionV2.description: Ingredient assertion (v2) per C2PA CDDL ingredient-map-v2.

relationship.description: Relationship of this ingredient to the asset; $relation-choice

instanceID.description: Unique identifier, e.g. value of the ingredient's xmpMM:InstanceID

data.description: Hashed URI to embedded data assertion or hashed_ext_uri to external data

data_types.description: Additional information about the data's type

c2pa_manifest.description: Hashed URI reference to the C2PA Manifest of the ingredient

thumbnail.description: Hashed URI reference to a thumbnail in an embedded data assertion

informational_URI.description: URI to an informational page about the ingredient or its data

ingredientAssertionV3.description: Ingredient assertion (v3) per C2PA CDDL ingredient-map-v3.

relationship.description: Relationship of this ingredient to the asset; $relation-choice

validationResults.description: Results from the claim generator performing full validation on the ingredient asset ($validation-results-map)

instanceID.description: Unique identifier, e.g. value of the ingredient's xmpMM:InstanceID

data.description: Hashed URI to embedded data assertion or hashed_ext_uri to external data

dataTypes.description: Additional information about the data's type (v3 camelCase)

activeManifest.description: Hashed URI to the box corresponding to the active manifest of the ingredient

claimSignature.description: Hashed URI to the Claim Signature box in the C2PA Manifest of the ingredient

thumbnail.description: Hashed URI reference to a thumbnail in an embedded data assertion

informationalURI.description: URI to an informational page about the ingredient or its data (v3 camelCase)

softBindingAlgorithmsMatched.description: Array of algorithm names used for discovering the active manifest

hashedExtUriMap.description: A data structure to store a reference to an external URL and its hash per C2PA CDDL $hashed-ext-uri-map. Contains the URL, the cryptographic hash algorithm identifier, hash, and optional MIME type, size, and data types. Used in ingredient v2/v3 data field.

url.description: HTTP/HTTPS URI reference to external data

alg.description: String identifying the cryptographic hash algorithm used to compute the hash on this URI's data, taken from the C2PA hash algorithm identifier list.

hash.description: Base64-encoded hash value of the external data

dc:format.description: IANA media type of the data (optional)

data_types.description: Additional information about the data's type (optional)

hashBmffAssertion.description: BMFF (ISO Base Media File Format) hash assertion

validationResults.description: Output of validation_results(): status codes for active manifest and ingredient deltas

activeManifest.description: Validation status codes for the active manifest

statusCodes.description: Success, informational, and failure validation status codes

validationStatusEntry.description: Single validation status (code, optional url and explanation)

ingredientDeltaValidationResult.description: Validation deltas for one ingredient's manifest

ingredientAssertionURI.description: JUMBF URI to the ingredient assertion
